name: Chinese: Szechwan Chicken and Cashews
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole chicken breasts, boned, skinned and cubed
1 tablespoon Chinese rice wine or dry sherry
1/2 to 1 tsp Crushed red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Minced fresh ginger
1/2 cup Unsalted cashews
Cooked rice
1. Marinate the chicken in 1 tablespoon soy sauce and rice wine for 30 minutes.
2. Combine 2 tablespoons soy sauce, cornstarch, sugar, and vinegar in a bowl; set aside.
3. Heat oil in a wok or skillet. Add red pepper to taste and cook until blackened.
4. Add the chicken and stir-fry for 2 minutes. Remove the chicken from the pan.
5. Add green onions and ginger, and stir-fry for 1 minute.
6. Return the chicken to the pan. Cook for 2 minutes.
7. Stir in the soy sauce mixture and any remaining chicken marinade.
8. Add cashews. Serve over cooked rice.
